scripts.dev:worker: cd services/inference && CHICKCOACH_DETECTOR=yolo CHICKCOACH_FALLBACK_DETECTOR=fake CHICKCOACH_API_URL=http://localhost:44100 CHICKCOACH_SAVE_FRAMES=1 CHICKCOACH_SAVE_FRAME_HISTORY=1 CHICKCOACH_DEBUG_DIR=debug_frames/yolo_brooder CAMERA_INDEX=2 CAPTURE_INTERVAL_SECONDS=0.5 YOLO_MODEL=yolov8n.pt YOLO_CLASS_IDS=14 YOLO_CONFIDENCE=0.03 YOLO_IMAGE_SIZE=960 watchmedo auto-restart --recursive --patterns='*.py;*.json' -- python3 main.py
